subject: Warp threshold_pick error
body:
Hi all,

I am trying to process EMPIAR-10641 with warpTools. However, I encountered 
the following error message: 

WarpTools threshold_picks --settings warp_tiltseries.settings --in_suffix 
3782 --out_suffix clean --top_picks 1000
Running command threshold_picks with:
in_suffix = 3782
out_suffix = clean
out_combined = null
minimum = null
maximum = null
top_series = null
top_picks = 1000
settings = warp_tiltseries.settings
input_data = {  }
input_data_recursive = False
input_processing = null
output_processing = null
input_norawdata = False

No alternative input specified, will use input parameters from 
warp_tiltseries.settings
File search will be relative to 
/data/csun/Projects/CART/EMPIAR-10164/myrelion5tomo/myrelion/tomostar
5 files found
Parsing previous results for each item, if available...
5/5, previous metadata found for 5                                         
                                          
2/5 parsedUnhandled exception. System.Exception: No files found matching 
TS_01_*3782.star                            
   at WarpTools.Commands.ThresholdPicks.Run(Object options) in 
/usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1728495487215/work/WarpTools/Commands/General/ThresholdPicks.cs:line 
93
   at WarpTools.WarpTools.Run(Object options) in 
/usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1728495487215/work/WarpTools/Program.cs:line 
30
   at Warp.Tools.CommandLineParserHelper.ParseAndRun(String[] args, Func`2 
run, Type[] verbs, String appName) in 
/usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1728495487215/work/WarpLib/Tools/CommandLineParserHelper.cs:line 
26
   at WarpTools.WarpTools.Main(String[] args) in 
/usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1728495487215/work/WarpTools/Program.cs:line 
17
   at WarpTools.WarpTools.<Main>(String[] args)
Aborted (core dumped)


It complains about not being able to find TS_01_*3782.star  in tomostar 
folder. However, there isn't supposed to have TS_01_*3782.star  in tomostar 
folder. I tried to fix this by setting input_data to the relion project 
folder but still didn't work. 

Has anyone encountered the same problem?

Best,
Chen
